dialogos.texto_en: Uesugi-san!\nGood morning!
Yotsuba?\nDid you come to see me off?
Of course.\nAfter all, we're%p-2;――
D-dating, and all that, y'know?\nTee-hee-hee...
Yeah...\nThanks a lot.
(It's been a few days\n since we returned from our graduation trip.\n The day has finally come for me to go to Tokyo.)
(Which means, that Yotsuba and I\n will be separated for a while%p-2;――%p;)
Today is goodbye, isn't it?
Yeah. I'm gonna miss you.
You're gonna miss me too, Uesugi-san?
Of course.\nThe noisy person always by my side\nwon't be there, starting tomorrow.
...I'm talking about you, Yotsuba?\nYou know that, right?
Hee-hee-hee.\nYou're a lonely person, aren't you.
If that's the case, should I come with you?
What are you talking about?\nDon't you have college too?
You worked so hard to get in.\nStudy hard for your own sake.
Ahaha, that's right.
Don't slack off on your studies\njust because I'm not there.\nI won't allow you to repeat a year!
I-I'll be fine.\nOh my gosh, you're too much.
I'll study hard at the university over in Tokyo.\nTo make not only my dreams%p-2;――
But your dreams come true, as well.
No matter how far apart we are,\nI'll be rooting for you, Uesugi-san.
I'll be rooting for you too from, from over there.
But... Tokyo really is far away.\nI'll be lonely too, you know.
That's why you taught me about social media, right?\nWe can always stay in touch,\nand I'll come back to visit sometimes.
Of course, you can come to visit me too, you know?\nI'll show you around Tokyo,\nso think of some places you wanna go.
O-of, of course I will!
Hm? Is there anything else?
If I graduate from college safely,\nCan I go be with you, Uesugi-san?
I said, if you're just visiting%p-2;――
Huh?\nIf you graduate, you mean?
Yeah, of course.\nI'm waiting for you.
Okay!
Four years.\nThat's quite a long time to make a promise.
This is our secret, just between the two of us.\nTeehee, our secrets and promises are piling up.
It's kind of nice. Just having secrets and promises\nthat only the two of us share makes me feel\nlike we're still connected, even if we're apart.
...Yeah.
Yotsuba, I think this is good enough for seeing me off.
Huh? Why?
Well, um...
I-if you came with me all the way to the platform,\nI might end up...taking you with me to Tokyo...\nor something like that...
Th-that would be a problem!\nIn that case, I'll stop here.
Yeah...
Well then, see you later, Yotsuba.\nI'll be waiting for you to come over here.
Yes, please wait for me.\nI'll definitely...definitely go!
